Uses of Class
jline.lang.distributions.MarkovianDistribution

  • Packages that use MarkovianDistribution 
    Package Description
    jline.lang
    Classes to declare basic elements of a model
    jline.lang.distributions
    This package contains statistical distributions used to specify arrival rates, service rates, and item popularities
    jline.lang.processes
    Classes to model stochastic processes that are not i.i.d.

      Subclasses of MarkovianDistribution in jline.lang.distributions 
      Modifier and Type Class Description
      class  APH  
      class  Cox2
      This class is a subclass of the general Coxian distribution class, but simplifies the usage for the special case of a two-phase Coxian distribution.
